item.description: Design of the Australian Humanitarian  Partnership Phase 3

item.title: GA2026/1370: RTK GNSS Equipment and Training
item.description: Geoscience Australia is seeking to procure 15 cost-effective RTK GNSS rover systems, associated accessories, training, and post-delivery support.

item.title: DPS26001013: To establish a Contract for Contract for Maintenance Services for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging Stations at Australian
item.description: Maintenance services related to the EV charging stations at Australian Parliament House (APH)

item.title: 25AMSA151: Indonesia Maritime Safety Technical Support Services
item.description: This ATM is for the provision of technical support services to deliver the Australian Maritime Safety Authority’s (AMSA) Indonesia Transport Safety Assistance Package (ITSAP) Maritime Safety program.

item.title: IT-25/270/84-OT: Event Stream Processing Solution RFP
item.description: Event Stream Processing  Solution

item.title: RFI-15434: Biometric Verification Capability
item.description: The ATO is seeking responses from the market for potential products and/or solutions for the requirement of a Biometric Liveness Detection Solution that can support the strategic objectives of the myID App. The intent of this RFI is identify the viability of potential solutions, the implementation and integration costs and the potential benefits of implementing this platform.

item.title: S-EST10782: South Bandiana Building Refurbishments, VIC
item.description: South Bandiana Building Refurbishments, VIC

item.title: RFI C2025/450321: Request for Information - Global Patent Data API
item.description: IP Australia is seeking information from the market to inform a future procurement for a Global Patent Data API service to replace the existing Global Patent Data API.

item.title: AZ6616: ESTL8180PH1 Facilities to support LAND8180 Aviation Field Fire Truck Capability Work Package 2 – Aircraft Fuselage Fire
item.description:
This is a notice for a potential upcoming procurement.

The ESTL8180PH1 Facilities to Support LAND8180 Aviation Field Fire Truck Capability, RAAF Base Amberley, Queensland Project will provide new and upgrade facilities at RAAF Amberley.  This work package will delivered via the Defence Medium Works Contract (Design and Construct) and will comprise of the design, fabrication, construction and installation of a bespoke Aircraft Fuselage Fire Training Aid (AFFTA) and all associated control and safety systems.

item.title: DHA-PROC26/572: Expression of Interest - Furnishings, Storage, Logistics and Associated Services
item.description:
DHA has a requirement to fully furnish multiple properties in our portfolio. This includes provision of goods, necessary logistics, temporary storage, and inventory management in between furniture usage.  

 DHA are seeking suppliers capable of delivering the following goods and services: 

1.      Providing furniture, electrical items and homewares (the furnishings).

2.      Providing associated services including delivery, assembly and staging of furnishings and inventory management and stock control (the services).

3.      Provision of logistic and storage services including packing, collection, storage and re-delivery (logistics and storage) for some of the furnishings.

Collectively, all elements are referred to as the requirement.

Upon registration and Deed of Confidentiality execution, an Information Pack can be provided to Respondents with further details.

item.title: 10018162: Child Sexual Abuse Recidivism Reduction Pilot Service
item.description: Conduct a pilot service to prevent child sexual abuse re-offending

item.title: MSD/RFI/87229/1: Screening, testing, and repair of Circuit Card Assemblies
item.description: Screening, testing, and repair of Circuit Card Assemblies.

item.title: Bordertown EOI: Agent Services Bordertown
item.description: The Australian Government agency Services Australia is seeking Expressions of Interest from organisations to provide agent services in Bordertown

item.title: FM26/19-1592/OT: Australian Dollar (AUD) Securities Pricing Data
item.description: Pricing information for securities eligible for use in the RBA’s domestic market operations.

item.title: ASQA_2025-26_9273: ASQA Regulatory Panel (ARP)
item.description: The Australian Skills Quality Authority (ASQA) is seeking tenders to establish the ASQA Regulatory Panel (ARP) to provide specialist regulatory services. The panel will support ASQA’s regulatory activities, including student assessment validations and regulatory assessments, through a multi supplier panel arrangement. Tenderers may apply for one or more service pillars as outlined in the Request for Tender.

item.title: ATM_2026_3088: Offshore decommissioning technical advisory services
item.description: The Department is seeking technical advisory services to support offshore oil and gas decommissioning planning, risk assessment, and regulatory engagement.

item.title: SPC-17440: Vulnerability Specialist Training
item.description:
The purpose of this procurement is to establish specialist vulnerability training solutions that strengthens judgement, confidence and capability for ATO staff who regularly manage interactions which may include complex, intersecting or high risk vulnerability.

The scope includes the design, delivery and evaluation of a scalable specialist learning solution tailored to the ATO context.

item.description: ESSB Rockhampton Civil Works

item.description: Business intelligence on the use of government precompetitive geoscience by the minerals and energy sectors

item.description: Printing and Distribution Services.

item.title: Antarctic ATM26/539: ATM 26/539 Customs Brokerage Services
item.description: Provision of Customs Brokerage Services to the Australian Antarctic Division

item.description: Russell Lift Refurbishment Works

item.title: MoAD-ATM-7369: Provision of Security Hardware and Maintenance Services
item.description: Provision of Security Hardware and Maintenance Services

item.title: 10032556: Establish services to undertake annual Remote Aerodrome Inspection
item.description: Inspections for up to 52 identified aerodromes in Northern Australia serving predominately First Nations communities in remote Australia.

item.title: ATM_2026_6621: Sediment Monitoring Program - Maugean Skate Program
item.description: The Department is seeking a provider to design and implement a field-validated Methodology for: quantifying the oxygen demand from sediment in Macquarie Harbour, and assess the drivers and context of oxygen demand; updating the bathymetry of key areas of Macquarie Harbour; determining, and possibly implementing, an appropriate Method for investigating Maugean skate prey species; and consolidating relevant environmental datasets The work will include the collection of sediment cores and associated samples across multiple sites in a manner that is statistically representative of the harbour, with repeat sampling of a subset of sites to assess seasonal influences. The work will require the design of a Methodology, consisting of a number of Methods, and its implementation through the collection and laboratory analysis of organic and inorganic sediment parameters, including assessment of sediment composition and microbial activity. The objective is to generate a comprehensive and integrated understanding of the sediments and benthic processes of Macquarie Harbour - in particular a scientifically defensible estimate of benthic oxygen demand across Macquarie Harbour, including the identification of areas with elevated oxygen demand arising from a number of possible sources; to enhance understanding of Macquarie Harbour’s physical environment through high-resolution bathymetry - in particular the dynamic environment of mouth of the Harbour -, if possible, to assess the historic and current availability of key Maugean skate prey species, and to support broader program analyses and the National Recovery Team for the Maugean skate.

item.title: IPINFRA-MS-2026-01: Maintenance and Living Services Contract - HMPNGS Tarangau PNG
item.description: Provision of M&S and Living Services at HMPNGS Tarangau (Lombrum), Manus Island PNG

item.title: ATM_2026_6551: Procurement of Energy Pipeline Data Services
item.description: The Customer seeks access to current, accurate, and reconciled project-level data on Australian utility-scale renewable energy generation, storage, and hybrid projects, drawn from multiple independent upstream sources

item.title: 26AMSA064: Air deployable drift modelling buoys
item.description: Air deployable drift modelling buoys

item.title: NRD07664: Charles Perkins House Lighting Upgrade
item.description:
The lighting system at Charles Perkins House (CPH) is at end of life, unserviceable, and no longer compliant with current safety and performance standards.    

The existing lighting system is Clipsal Schneider DALI, as per the specifications in the Approach to Market document.    

The full LED upgrade must:

• Ensure compliance with workplace safety and illumination standards.

• Support the NIAA’s Net Zero targets through energy-efficient infrastructure.

• Achieve recommended lux levels across all workstations.

item.title: ATM_2026_6339: Provision of Host Broadcaster Services
item.description: Seeking to engage a suitably experienced and qualified supplier to provide Host Broadcaster Services for Pre-COP.

item.title: ASCA-PITCHDAY-26-DDC: ASCA Pitch Day 2026 - Decoy, Deception, Camouflage and Concealment (DDCC)
item.description: Request for Information on innovative decoy, deception, camouflage and concealment technologies.

item.title: ATM_2025_4157: Contamination Management Plans for Jabiru Town
item.description: Contamination Management Plans for Jabiru Town

item.title: TSY-ATM-109176: Learning and Development Services for the Treasury Graduate Development Program
item.description: The Provider will work with the Department to design, develop, deliver, administer, and evaluate the formal learning component of the two-year Graduate Development Program (GDP).

item.title: ATM_2026_5994: Electricity Demand and Network Impacts Modelling Capability
item.description: The Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water is seeking an integrated modelling capability to analyse electricity demand and network impacts under different future scenarios, including electrification, EV uptake, consumer energy resources and large industrial loads.

item.title: DTA-ICT-86508: Software and ERP Marketplace Panel - Category 2: Commercial-off-the-Shelf
item.description: The Digital Transformation Agency (DTA) invites potential new sellers to apply to join Category 2 of the Commercial off the Shelf (COTS) Software and/or related services, operating as the Software and ERP Marketplace Panel.

item.description: Replacement Vessel for RV Capricornus - The Australian Institute of Marine Science (AIMS) requires the design, construction, supply, and delivery of a new fit for purpose small research vessel (the “Vessel”) to be delivered to AIMS Darwin, Northern Territory.

item.title: C005676: C005676 Approach to Market - Research with CAOs and MACs in Cambodia
item.description: Approach to Market - Development of a research project with local Commune Agricultural Officers and Modern Agricultural Cooperatives for improved vegetable and rice production in Cambodia

item.title: F26860: Safety Culture Program
item.description: Development and delivery of a front-line safety leadership program

item.title: 10032193: Norfolk Island Kingston Pier Dredging and Pier Remediation Project
item.description:
The Department is seeking to engage a supplier to deepen and widen the 

channel seabed adjacent to Kingston Pier at Norfolk Island, install a navigation 

aid, and to undertake repairs and strengthening to Pier.

item.title: NMAT2526/14: Deed of Standing Offer for Fine Art Freight Services
item.description:
The National Museum of Australia (‘the Customer’ or ‘the Museum’) researches, collects, preserves and exhibits historical material of the Australian nation as well as bringing international exhibitions to Australia for display. The Customer regularly requires fine art freight services to move exhibitions of varying sizes across Australia and internationally.  

The Customer would like to establish a Deed of Standing Offer (DoSO) with experienced supplier(s) for the provision of international and domestic fine art freight services.  

Tenderers are asked to respond to one or both of the following Service Categories:

1. International Fine Art Freight Services

2. Domestic Fine Art Freight Services 

This DoSO will be available for use by all Commonwealth entities and companies.

item.title: DHAPROC26/750: Expression of Interest - Creative and Media Services
item.description: DHA has a requirement to implement a strategic marketing program to generate awareness of DHA and the benefits of investing.

item.title: PPCOP31T-26: Event planning, logistics and delivery support services
item.description: Professional Event Planning, Logistics and Delivery Support Services are required to support the coordination and delivery of a leadership event to be held in Funafuti, Tuvalu from the 5 -6 October 2026.

item.title: NOTICE DHAPROC26/750: NOTICE OF INTENDED PROCUREMENT - SUPPLIER EOI CREATIVE & MEDIA SERVICES
item.description: Defence Housing Australia (DHA) is issuing this Notice of Intended Procurement (NOIP) for our upcoming Creative and Media Services Expression of Interest (EOI).

item.title: 10031970: Area Packages 1 and 3 (AP1/3)
item.description:
The Australian Government is planning a future HSR network to connect Brisbane, Sydney, Canberra, Melbourne and regional communities across the east coast of Australia.

The Authority is the Australian Government’s principal adviser on the development of HSR. Its purpose is to develop a nationally integrated HSR network, connecting cities and key regional centres, enhancing Australia’s long-term rail investment through policy development, national coordination, and strategic planning.

item.title: 10031971: TSSI - Trains, Systems and Systems Integration
item.description: The Authority seeks to engage suitably experienced Early Contractor Involvement (ECI) Partners on a fee-for-service, collaborative basis to develop the designs and program for the project, with an initial cooperative phase (Project Conformance and Validation Period), followed by a competitive ECI process finishing with a Proposal Submission by ECI Partners.

item.title: 24/1281/44: Reserve Bank of Australia – 65 Martin Place Head Office Redevelopment Stage 2 – Structural Engineering Services
item.description: Structural Engineering Services for the Base Building Design of the Reserve Bank’s 65 Martin Place Head Office Redevelopment Project.

item.title: S-EST11298: Royal Military College Building Refurbishment, ACT
item.description: Royal Military College Building Refurbishment

item.title: DHAPROC26/311: Asphalt and Line Marking Stages 2 to 6, Nirimba Fields
item.description:
Request for Tender (RFT) covers the supply and installation of Asphalt and Line marking across Stages 2 to 6 Nirimba Fields, Blacktown, NSW  

Please Note: Defence Housing Australia (DHA) is not required to comply with the Commonwealth Procurement Framework, including the Commonwealth Procurement Rules (CPRs).  DHA is not a prescribed Corporate Commonwealth entity for the purposes of the CPRs under Section 30 of the Public Governance, Performance and Accountability Rule 2014.  Given this, other aspects of the RFT tender process, may not (and are not required to) be consistent with the CPRs. This RFT is issued through AusTender to leverage a convenient and efficient tendering platform and provide notification of the opportunity to suppliers

item.title: 5507-2025-26: Ozonesondes and related supplies
item.description: The provision of a service provider to deliver the Ozonesondes and related supplies.

item.title: AZ6622: ESTS4000PH6 Facilities to support DDG Combat System Enhancement- Notice of potential upcoming procurement
item.description:
This is a notice for a potential upcoming procurement for the Head Contractor package of works (Defence Head Contract HC-GMP) under project ESTS4000PH6 Facilities to Support the Hobart Class Destroyer Combat System Enhancement Capability Project (the Project). 

SEA4000PH6 aims to deliver an Aegis Baseline 9 and Australian Interface combat system enhancement to the Hobart Class Guided Missile Destroyers. The facilities component of the Project focuses on delivering suitable land-based facilities to support SEA4000PH6 prior to Q3 2029. 

Potential tenderers are advised that the procurement strategy for the Project involves the engagement of a HC-GMP to deliver the Works via a 2-stage Invitation to Register (ITR) and Request for Tender (RFT).

item.title: MGF_17: Supply of Medical Grade Footwear to eligible persons
item.description:
NOTE: existing suppliers need not reapply

The Medical Grade Footwear (MGF) Programme is an important part of DVA’s health care arrangements and is part of the Rehabilitation Appliance Programme (RAP).  The MGF Programme provides a nation-wide access to a wide range of MGF and related services for entitled persons.

item.title: CNS16: Department of Veterans' Affairs Community Nursing Services Invitation
item.description: Department of Veterans' Affairs invites interested suppliers of Community Nursing Services to apply to provide these services from 1 July 2016.

item.description:
The Commonwealth of Australia represented by the Department of Defence (Defence) proposes to establish a list of Indigenous suppliers capable of undertaking construction works. 

Defence accordingly invites suitably qualified Indigenous Enterprises to participate in a request for information process.

item.title: DPC-2017: Invitation to provide Day Procedure Centre Services to the Veteran Community
item.description: The Department of Veterans’ Affairs (DVA) is seeking to contract with eligible stand-alone private day hospitals (referred to as Day Procedure Centres or DPCs) to provide DPC services for DVA Entitled Persons across Australia from 1 October 2017 onwards.

item.title: PHS-16: Private Hospital Services
item.description: DVA is seeking the provision of Private Hospital services for Entitled Persons by publishing this Invitation to Provide Private Hospital Services to the Veteran Community.
